display_information.name: Kortny
display_information.long_description:
It works like a teammate, not a chatbot you visit. Mention Kortny in any channel, send it a DM, or open the assistant panel, and it picks up the task, does the work, and posts the result right back in the thread, with the research, drafts, documents, and follow-through handled along the way.

*What Kortny does*

• *Research and synthesis*: searches the web and your workspace, weighs sources, and writes up cited, decision-ready briefs.
• *Polished documents*: produces print-quality PDF reports, slide decks, and spreadsheets with covers, charts, and proper page layout, not plain text dumps.
• *Data and analysis*: runs real code in a secure sandbox to crunch numbers, build charts, and turn raw data into answers.
• *Drafting and writing*: reports, recaps, release notes, internal comms, cold emails, and more, written in your team's voice.
• *Works in your stack*: connects to the tools you already use (Linear, GitHub, Notion, Google, and many more) to read context and take action.
• *Remembers*: learns your workspace facts, preferences, and history, so you never have to repeat yourself.
• *Stays proactive*: watches channels with your permission, surfaces opportunities worth acting on, and runs recurring work on a schedule you set in plain English.

*How to use it*

• *Mention it*: `@Kortny summarize this thread and draft a follow-up`
• *DM it*: for quick questions or private work.
• *Open the assistant panel*: for longer, back-and-forth conversations while Kortny narrates what it is doing in real time.
• *React to guide it*: ✅ to approve an action, 🚫 to skip, ❌ to cancel, 🔄 to retry.
• *Ask it to remember*: say "remember our company is Acme Capital" and it sticks.
• *Schedule it*: try "every Monday at 9am, post a digest of last week's wins."

*Built to be trusted*

• *Autonomous by design*: Kortny acts on its own for everyday work and only pauses to ask before anything destructive or outward-facing.
• *Sandboxed execution*: code and skills run in an isolated, network-free container, so compute stays safe.
• *Vetted skills*: every capability is reviewed before it is installed and scoped to where you want it.
• *Self-hosted*: Kortny runs on your own infrastructure, with your model keys and your data. Nothing leaves your control.

*Get started*

Invite Kortny to a channel and mention it with a task, or open the assistant panel and just ask. The more it works alongside you, the more it learns your team.

assistant_view.assistant_description: Kortny is your AI coworker inside Slack. Ask it to research, draft documents, analyze data, track decisions, and automate recurring work, all without leaving your channels.
